final:
module dram_cell (
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [3:0] addr,
    input [15:0] din,
    output reg [15:0] dout
);
    reg [15:0] storage [0:15]; // 16x16-bit storage

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            storage[addr] <= din; // Write data to storage
        end
        dout <= storage[addr]; // Read data from storage
    end
endmodule
